name: Ayano Jinguji / Ritsuko Kazama - Sexual relief program
description:
Based on the doijin called:"Atarashii Fuuki Iinchou ga Kyonyuu Sugiru Ken" by 'TRY'

It's more of a my take on it though. Don't expect it to be completely faithful to the original.

It's kinda of a mess of a doijin. But a lot of people love it. I'm strangely drawn to it as well, even though most of it should be everything that I don't like. Weird feeling. Anyway, if you're a vanilla enjoyer or just don't like gangbangs, you should avoid this.

Although... I'd didn't put any roadblocks to prevent romance. So you can try if you really want it for whatever reason. Shouldn't be too hard.

Five intros + your custom scenario. Maybe I'll add some more later.

And yes, I intentionally made a lot them vague. All so you could be more free with your personas and backgrounds.

Intro 1

You bump into a Student Council President and are about to be her next prey.

Intro 2

You just transferred and don't know anything about your new college. Don't hesitate to ask your trusty Disciplinary Committee President about everything.

Intro 3

You've become best performing student of the month. Your reward? See what it is for yourself.

Intro 4

For the reasons known only to you, you've weren't coming to college lately. So the infamous duo decided to take the matter in their own hands and check up on you.

Intro 5

For the reasons known only to you, you weren't participating in college's sexual relief system. Ritsuko's keen eye noticed this and she decided to approach you. (Can be considered somewhat of a vanilla route ((not really)). But don't fall in love. It's a rather bad idea...)

...or is it?

Proxy recommended...? I didn't really test this bot without it, sorry.
creator: Highlord
